data.title: Bizzdesign enters Tech200 at 17th place after 392% UK public sector revenue growth. Top 20 of fastest-growing UK suppliers.
data.description: A company specializing in enterprise transformation software as a service has achieved a significant milestone by securing the 17th spot in Tussell's Tech200 ranking for the fastest-growing UK public sector technology suppliers. This independent annual list highlights the top 200 companies in the sector, and the company's entry into the Top 20 signifies a notable achievement in their growth and impact. The company is based in Enschede, Netherlands, and the ranking was announced on February 19, 2026. This recognition underscores the company's strong performance and relevance in the competitive technology market, showcasing their dedication to innovation and success.

data.title: SAP suggests dividend of €2.50 per share, up by €0.15 (6.4%) from last year's dividend.
data.description: In Walldorf, Germany, on February 19, 2026, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) has announced a proposed dividend of €2.50 per share for fiscal year 2025. This marks a 6.4% increase, amounting to €0.15 more than the dividend distributed in fiscal year 2024. Both the Supervisory Board and Executive Board are in favor of this recommendation and urge shareholders to approve it.

data.title: NHOA Energy is progressing on the 10 MW/51 MWh project for Neoen in Italy, with commissioning set for late spring 2026.
data.description: A company known as NHOA Energy, a major player in the utility-scale energy storage systems industry, is currently in the process of building the Broni Battery project in Broni (Pavia), Italy. This project, carried out for Neoen, a prominent renewable energy producer, will have a capacity of 10 MW and 51 MWh. The construction work at the site is currently in progress and is on track as per the schedule. The plan is to commence commissioning activities around late spring in 2026. The Broni Battery is expected to offer crucial flexibility and support once it becomes operational.

data.title: M-Cube and SOLUM team up for digital signage and ESL solutions in Europe, enhancing retail experience.
data.description: SOLUM, an ICT solutions provider, has collaborated with M-Cube to offer integrated digital signage and ESL solutions throughout Europe. The partnership aims to enhance the retail experience by combining innovative technologies. The move is expected to reach a vast audience across the continent.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation sets sights on quantum readiness, gas limits for 2026 after a successful 2025 with major upgrades and higher gas limit.
data.description: In 2025, the Ethereum Foundation labeled it as one of its most successful years, emphasizing the completion of two significant network upgrades and a substantial rise in the gas limit.

data.title: DerivaDEX launches Bermuda-licensed DEX, offering crypto swaps with a test license from Bermuda’s regulator, operating under DAO governance.
data.description: The decentralized exchange has recently introduced cryptocurrency perpetual swaps after being granted a trial license from Bermuda's regulatory body. It operates based on DAO governance and adheres to formal oversight.
